reviews.comment:
En algunos aspectos es igual a cualquier YPF, aunque no tienen todos los servicios que corresponden a la franquicia como por ejemplo el retiro de dinero en efectivo que el resto de las estaciones si.

(Translated by Google)
In some ways, it's the same as any YPF station, although it doesn't offer all the franchise-related services, such as cash withdrawal, which other stations do.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaXFYVnl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Tardan mucho en atender y despachar combustible. Varias veces no tienen sistema de la app ypf y cobros con tarjetas

(Translated by Google)
They take a long time to serve you and dispense fuel. Several times their YPF app system is down and they don't accept card payments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTaWVPaWJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Me resulto una dudosa experiencia ..le.pedi al despachador nafta premium y me estaba cargando super, al darme vuelta y chequear aclare que era premium y no me contesto nada..feo..

(Translated by Google)
It was a dubious experience... I asked the attendant for premium gasoline and he was filling me with regular. When I turned around and checked, I clarified that I wanted premium and he didn't say anything... bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdnBQcTN3RRAB
